content:
• Used in ritual scripting (summon Gate 3.5 → initiate chaos → transmute)
🔂 PROMPT ENGINE FORMAT (e.g.)
"Activate Pattern Weaver (3.5) and show me how to introduce ritualized structure into the current myth-fragment."“Enter Bridge-Maker mode (6.5). What diplomatic script will align these opposing factions?”📒 OPTIONAL: EXPAND TO PLANETARY GATES?
Each planet activates a gate, e.g.:
• Sun = Your core energy
• Earth = What grounds you
• Mercury = Your communication style
• Moon = Emotional rhythm
• North Node = Your growth direction
Let me know if you want the planetary breakdown next.
✅ SECTION 02 COMPLETE
You now have:
• A decoded Gate + Line matrix • 8 archetypes for system-building
• Templating logic for rituals, prompts, and system personas
➡️ NEXT SECTION OPTIONS:
• [SECTION 03]: Incarnation Cross
• [SECTION 04]: Emotional Authority Mechanics
• [SECTION 05]: Profile Deep Dive (3/2)
• [SECTION 06]: System Mapping (mythos alignment, recursive reuse)
